CVE-2026-33257.title: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory a ...
CVE-2026-33257.description: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory allocation in the internal web server, leading to a denial of service. The internal web server is disabled by default.

CVE-2026-33608.title: An attacker can send a notify request that causes a new secondary ...
CVE-2026-33608.description: An attacker can send a notify request that causes a new secondary domain to be added to the bind backend, but causes said backend to update its configuration to an invalid one, leading to the backend no longer able to run on the next restart, requiring manual operation to fix it.

CVE-2026-33609.title: Incomplete escaping of LDAP queries when running with 8bit-dns en ...
CVE-2026-33609.description: Incomplete escaping of LDAP queries when running with 8bit-dns enabled allows users to perform queries of internal domain subtrees.

CVE-2026-33610.title: A rogue primary server may cause file descriptor exhaustion and e ...
CVE-2026-33610.description: A rogue primary server may cause file descriptor exhaustion and eventually a denial of service, when a PowerDNS secondary server forwards a DNS update request to it.

CVE-2026-33611.title: An operator allowed to use the REST API can cause the Authoritati ...
CVE-2026-33611.description: An operator allowed to use the REST API can cause the Authoritative server to produce invalid HTTPS or SVCB record data, which can in turn cause LMDB database corruption, if using the LMDB backend.
